step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the initial conclusion. An additional reason is that blue staining specifically identifies regions where cell metabolism has ceased, which occurs during irreversible ischemia seen in acute MI. This corroborates the link between blue coloration and compromised coronary perfusion.
raw_response:
I agree with the initial conclusion. An additional reason is that blue staining specifically identifies regions where cell metabolism has ceased, which occurs during irreversible ischemia seen in acute MI. This corroborates the link between blue coloration and compromised coronary perfusion.
